description: Datadog monitor quick pack for Synapse SDK baseline SLO alerts.

monitors.name: Synapse SDK Transport Failure Ratio > 5% (warning)
monitors.message: Synapse SDK transport failure ratio is above 5% for 10m. Check API transport health, retry policy, and network path.

monitors.name: Synapse SDK Queue Growth > 50% vs prior window
monitors.message: Synapse SDK queue size increased >50% versus prior window. Investigate downstream API availability and flush pressure.

monitors.name: Synapse SDK Proposal Drop (no proposals with active traffic)
monitors.message: Synapse SDK has active event traffic but zero proposals in the last 30m. Check extractor/synthesizer path and moderation ingestion.
